items.title: MoEFCC Organizes 2-day Workshop to Address Challenge of Elephant-train Collisions
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change MoEFCC Organizes 2-day Workshop to Address Challenge of Elephant-train Collisions 77 Critical Railway Stretches Prioritised to Curb Elephant Mortalities; 705 Mitigation Structures Recommended Posted On: 12 MAR 2026 9:31AM by PIB Delhi The Project Elephant Division of the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change (MoEFCC…
